name: Chocolate Creme De Mints
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips over hot water, not boiling, until smooth. Remove from heat.
2. Stir in the sour cream until combined.
3. Add the mint-flavored liqueur and stir until smooth.
4. Transfer to a small bowl and chill for about 30 minutes, or until thickened.
5. Fill a pastry bag fitted with a decorative tip.
6. Pipe one-inch candies onto foil-lined cookie sheets.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
